diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: coronary artery disease, diabetes type 2, hypothyroid, depression, asthma
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient was admitted after experiencing a syncopal episode, which was witnessed and involved several minutes of loss of consciousness. Extensive monitoring and evaluation including an electrocardiogram, heart monitoring, blood work, and a study of the brain were all reassuring. The initial syncopal episode, along with the patient's medical history, informed the final diagnosis.
